title: 1) Patient
text:
Cosmetic acupuncture is all about caring. Patients should feel comfortable and cared for.
Any complaints or bleeding/bruising should not be ignored or neglected. After removing the
needles, check every point needled not only with the eyes, but with a sterile dry cotton ball
to not miss any bleeding or bruising. Most of all, do not ignore the patient’s complaint about
pain. Pain is very subjective; there is no one-size-ﬁts-all method.
